data_collection: Derived from the official HotpotQA dev distractor source file.
data_limitations: English Wikipedia-derived HotpotQA dev distractor only; paragraph-level evidence granularity; local preprocessing assumptions.
data_preprocessing: Paragraph-level corpus, question, qrel, manifest, metadata, and checksum files emitted by maxionbench.tools.preprocess_hotpot_portable.
intended_use: Evaluate retrieval infrastructure by evidence coverage, latency, conformance, and task-cost accounting.
not_intended_use: claims about managed vector database deployments
responsible_ai_scope: NeurIPS E&D reviewer artifact metadata for a retrieval-evaluation preprocessing.
